caption: A person holds a blue pack of "'21-22 NBA TRADING CARDS" from the "MOSAIC" series, featuring a basketball player in a white jersey. The pack indicates it contains "15 CARDS" and displays the "PANINI" and "DUNK 10 FREE" logos. The person's hands grip the edges of the pack against a background with orange and white patterns. To the right, a split-screen layout shows a chat feed and a small webcam window of a man with a beard wearing a black shirt. The chat contains messages from "grovebog07" saying "turning" and "Nighty" stating "CSA the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/2ZexuKX". Throughout the sequence, the pack remains held in the same position, and the man in the webcam window remains still, with no significant changes occurring between the frames.
